items.title: Profit-taking across bitcoin, ether, solana as traders wait on the Iran signing
items.whyYouShouldCare: Profit-taking in major cryptocurrencies, including Solana, indicates traders are cautious, potentially affecting liquidity and market dynamics.

items.title: XRP just beat Ethereum, Solana and others in 90-Day RWA flows as traders pile back into the token
items.whyYouShouldCare: XRP's recent gains in real-world asset flows suggest competitive pressure on Solana, impacting its market positioning and investor interest.

items.title: Solana treasury firms resist Forward Industries’ consolidation push
items.whyYouShouldCare: Resistance from Solana treasury firms against consolidation efforts may signal confidence in the ecosystem's independence and future growth potential.
